notes: Fail-closed source-gate register for the national petroleum ledger program. It records what is usable, partial or blocked without converting blocked workstreams into values.
source_rights: Project metadata/prose CC BY 4.0; upstream source rights remain with source publishers.
citation: Fuel Resilience AU petroleum ledger source-gate review, 2026-04-23.

workstreams.name: State-by-state petroleum ledger
workstreams.result: State ledger surface exists with production, role, revenue context and attribution-boundary fields.

workstreams.name: Royalty and receipt coverage by state
workstreams.result: WA and Queensland petroleum receipt rows are loaded. NSW and NT combined royalty context is loaded with non-petroleum-only caveats. Other states remain unavailable.

workstreams.name: Project/site/permit counts by state
workstreams.result: NOPTA current offshore title/permit records and Petroleum Wells layer records are loaded as separate object classes. Onshore/state title systems, producing-field counts, LNG trains, processing plants and terminal counts remain unavailable.

workstreams.name: Project/company production mapping
workstreams.result: NOPTA active offshore production licences map basin, field, title operator and title holders where published. REMP 2024 oil and gas rows map major projects to companies and estimated new capacity. Current project/company production volumes remain unavailable.

workstreams.name: Live or near-live national outage coverage
workstreams.result: WA weekly manual and QLD monthly programmatic partial layers exist. No national live station outage feed is loaded.

workstreams.name: Terminal and shipping visibility
workstreams.result: PM&C aggregate tanker counts and APS/MSO stock context are loaded. Terminal-capacity and live vessel-level feeds remain unavailable.

workstreams.name: Defensible national status model
workstreams.result: The model gate exists, but source coverage and threshold rules are not sufficient to publish Stable/Tight/Disrupted/Critical.

candidate_sources.caveat: State/territory production only; not project/company mapping.

candidate_sources.source: Geoscience Australia AECR 2025 gas and oil
candidate_sources.caveat: Basin rows are not a complete state/project/company ledger.

candidate_sources.source: WA Overview of State Taxes and Royalties 2025-26
candidate_sources.supports: WA petroleum/North West Shelf receipt context
candidate_sources.caveat: Receipt context only; collection channels and period must stay visible.
Source notes petroleum includes gas converted into LNG.

candidate_sources.supports: Combined minerals and petroleum royalty context plus petroleum royalty rate
candidate_sources.caveat: Not petroleum-only; do not display as petroleum receipts.

candidate_sources.supports: Combined mining and petroleum royalty context plus petroleum royalty rate
candidate_sources.caveat: Not petroleum-only; revised budget/forecast context, not actual petroleum receipts.

candidate_sources.supports: Current offshore title/permit records, Petroleum Wells layer records and active production licence field/operator mapping
candidate_sources.caveat: Counts and mapping rows are separate object classes. Production licence mapping is regulatory title metadata, not production volume; well-layer records are not active or producing wells; Greenhouse Gas Assessment Permits are excluded from petroleum title counts.

candidate_sources.source: Resources and Energy Major Projects 2024 data workbook
candidate_sources.publisher: Department of Industry, Science and Resources
candidate_sources.supports: Oil and gas project, company, state, resource, status and estimated new capacity rows
candidate_sources.caveat: Major-project/development mapping only. Company names are publisher-supplied project company/proponent text, basin names are not published, and annual estimated new capacity is not current production.

candidate_sources.source: DCCEEW ministerial release: Securing Australia's fuel sovereignty
candidate_sources.publisher: Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water
candidate_sources.supports: Operating refinery count and named refinery locations
candidate_sources.caveat: Facility count only; no throughput, capacity, utilisation or outage status.
Dataset is old and licence is listed as not specified on data.gov.au.

candidate_sources.source: Geoscience Australia National Liquid Fuel Terminals 2015
candidate_sources.caveat: Location snapshot only; no terminal capacity, inventory or live operational status.
